message:
test(fcp-conformance/event-envelope): pin builder + canonical_bytes + OrderingPolicy serde (br-6o8ik)

EventEnvelope is the streaming-event wrapper used by every connector
that emits events. The schema 'fcp.stream/EventEnvelope/v1.1.0' is
wire format and canonical_bytes drives cursor/dedup keys downstream.
OrderingPolicy serde uses snake_case (gateway / per_key / unordered).
Zero conformance pinning.

Adds 24 tests against the public fcp_core::EventEnvelope +
OrderingPolicy + EventData API:

- 2× schema pinning (namespace=fcp.stream, name=EventEnvelope,
  version=1.1.0) — bumping is a deliberate cross-release coordination
  step
- 8× builder method pinning (new defaults, with_seq, with_cursor,
  requiring_ack, with_stream_key, with_ordering, with_cursor_seq,
  builder_chains_are_deterministic)
- json_serde_omits_stream_key_when_none (forward compat with v1.0)
- json_serde_omits_ordering_when_none
- json_serde_includes_stream_key_when_some
- json_serde_roundtrip_preserves_envelope_fields
- ordering_policy_serde_uses_snake_case_wire_form (3 variants
  with literal expected strings — wire contract)
- ordering_policy_serde_roundtrip_for_all_variants
- ordering_policy_rejects_unknown_variant_strings (4 reject cases
  including uppercase variant — phantom-policy negotiation defense)
- canonical_bytes_is_deterministic_for_fixed_envelope (cursor/dedup
  keys depend on this)
- canonical_bytes_differs_when_seq_differs (otherwise dedup
  would alias distinct events)
- 3× EventData builder default + with_correlation_id pinning
- schema_id_construction_independent_of_envelope_state

All 24 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
event_envelope_builder_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
